message:
fix: Parser and codegen fixes for Python compatibility

- comprehensions: Add emitForLoopTarget() to emit raw identifier names for
  for-loop captures, preventing closure variable prefix from causing invalid
  Zig syntax like `for (iter) |__cap_x.y|`
- comparison: Always wrap comparison expressions in parentheses to prevent
  Zig chained comparison errors when compare nodes are nested
- control: Add one-liner else clause support for while/for loops, fix trailing
  comma handling in for loop targets, use parseStarredExpr for iterable
- misc: Make parseStarredExpr public, fix yield with starred expressions and
  trailing commas, add comma-separated exception type support
